title: Tamarind Comfort Broil
description: A comforting Indian (Udipi) dish featuring tamarind balls, blended with a creamy base and topped with a peppery sauce for a whole30-friendly meal.
instructions: Blend the tamarind pulp with the avocado and spices until smooth.
Add almond milk, coconut cream, salt, and ginger. Blend again until creamy.
Heat a broiler in your oven or use an electric broil if available. Set up the dish according to your preference (e.g., preheated baking sheet).
Pour the blended mixture over the dish and sprinkle cumin seeds on top.
Broil for 10 minutes or until the edges are slightly golden brown.
Serve hot with a side of raita or sprouts as per taste.
